title: The American Experience
overview: TV's most-watched history series brings to life the compelling stories from our past that inform our understanding of the world today.

episodes.title: Hearts and Hands
episodes.overview: The design and art of quilting yields intimate clues about the lives of 19th century women, who stitched their personal and political stories into these artifacts of history.
